blocks.text: Bernabéu Awaits: Champions League's Biggest Night of the Season

Tuesday delivers the heavyweight bout of the European calendar: Bayern vs Real Madrid at the Bernabéu. Meanwhile, Arsenal — La Liga's nearest Premier League challenger in form — seek a priceless away leg in Lisbon.
♟️ FIDE Candidates Round 8 — Halfway done in Cyprus, the leaderboard starts to reveal who truly contends for the world title | 14:30
🎮 PGL Bucharest CS2 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) flies the Norwegian flag in Bucharest; watch closely for Norwegian progress | 02:00
